title: Top AgTech YouTube Channels
description: Subscriber ranking for agtech: 13 channels, median 9,610 subs, leader 153,000, captured 2026-07-12.
answer_first: New Holland Agriculture tops the agtech table with 153,000 subscribers in this July 12, 2026 capture. The 13-channel field has a median of 9,610 subscribers, and a public business contact is listed by 3 of 13. First capture: 2026-07-12. The initial baseline records 13 channels to compare future refreshes against. See the table for each channel's subscribers, video output, country, and public-contact status.
facts: As of 2026-07-12, 13 channels make the cut, adding up to 319,580 subscribers.
New Holland Agriculture leads with 153,000 subscribers, while the ranking's median is 9,610.
Public-contact availability: 3 of 13 channels expose one; the address itself is never republished.
The 13 channels account for 5,471 uploaded videos combined.
By country, United States leads: 3 of the 13 channels.
Initial capture (2026-07-12) logs 13 channels as the comparison baseline.

faq.a: A keyword crawl for 'agtech' on 2026-07-12, keeping each discovered channel's public statistics. The resulting 13 channels are ordered by subscribers, with videos and country alongside.

faq.q: How do I reach the creators listed?
faq.a: This dataset stays aggregate-only: 3 of 13 channels list some public business contact, and that count is all this page publishes. Use the source actor to collect what channels expose publicly.

faq.q: Are most of these channels large?
faq.a: No - the distribution is skewed. The median channel has 9,610 subscribers against 153,000 at the top, so most of the 13 channels are far smaller than the leader.
Yes, constantly - they are live public statistics captured 2026-07-12. Scheduled refreshes update the same URL and report how the 13-channel ranking moved.
